series_metadata.series_title: Data Processing Product/Vendor and State Contracts Reference Files
series_metadata.series_description: Information on data processing equipment, software, and other products and their vendors.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepencies are resolved, then destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepencies are resolved, then destroyed., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
